/home/runner/work/eckit/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC  -pipe -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-sign-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/link.d  -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -shared -Wl,-soname,libeckit_cmd.so -o ../../../lib/libeckit_cmd.so CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/AliasCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/Arg.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/CmdApplication.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/CmdArg.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/CmdParser.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/CmdResource.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/ConfigCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/DirCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/EchoCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/EnvironmentCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/ExportCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/HistoryCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/JSONCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/KillCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/LibEcKitCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/LockCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/ManCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/MemoryCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/PsCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/QuitCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/RemoteCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/RemoteCommandUser.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/RemoteCommandable.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/RemoteCommander.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/SleepCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/StartCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/StatusCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/StopCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/TailCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/TermBuf.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/UpTimeCmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/UserInput.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_cmd.dir/term.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib" -lcurses /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libform.so ../../../lib/libeckit.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -ldl
